criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and time spent on the app.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store analytics, in-app analytics tools

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent and effectiveness of AI features in the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs, and expert analyses

criteria.name: User Reviews
criteria.description: The average rating and sentiment of user reviews.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store reviews, external review sites

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: The total number of app downloads.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store analytics, app tracking platforms

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The uniqueness and creativity of the app's features.
criteria.sources: Tech blogs, app descriptions, expert analyses

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: The measures taken to protect user data and privacy.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, privacy policies, security audits

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: The app's availability and performance across different platforms and devices.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs
